steps.title: Spot the defining signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the example where audience members shared pictures of their hairstyles during live performances. This shows people actively participating in Zollar's creative work.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Involved in means to take an active role in something, which directly matches the example of audience members participating in Zollar's performances. The others miss this mark: nervous about describes an emotion, completed by reverses who's doing the work, and delayed by indicates obstruction. That matches choice D — D is correct.
